violations.text: Menu is lacking and allergen statement.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Handwashing signage was lacking in restroom. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
